fields.title: Thread Read and Find Tools for Session Context Access
fields.description: Implement read_thread and find_thread tools in tau to enable agents to access historical session context from other threads. This maps AMP's thread reading concept to tau's native session architecture, allowing agents to continue work from handoffs and search across previous conversations without manual context copying.
fields.design: Map 'thread' to persisted pi session files. Implement as Effect service (ThreadCatalog) with deterministic search and read operations. Use SessionManager for file access and branch-aware context reconstruction. Keep AMP-compatible tool names and parameters. Enable in main session, smart/deep/rush modes, and oracle. Use cached catalog scanning for find_thread with mtime-based invalidation. Use relevance scoring for goal-focused excerpting in read_thread without LLM calls inside the tool.
